column1: Equal Opportunity SA (EOSA) Annual Report Data 2023-24

Equal Opportunity SA is a business unit of the Attorney-General's Department (AGD). Information on corporate and financial performance, risk management (including fraud detected and public interest disclosure), public complaints and audited financial statements can be found in the 2023-24 Annual Report for AGD.

Note: From 1 July 2021 the office ceased delivering training directly to the public. From 2021-22 the number of training sessions delivered only includes sessions delivered by partner training providers.
